Citrus County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Citrus County, Florida

FHA loans across Citrus County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why this Nature Coast county is so affordable for FHA buyers, and how to get pre-approved.

Citrus County Home Loans

FHA loans in Citrus County, Florida

Citrus County, on Florida's Nature Coast, is famous for the manatees of Crystal River and its laid-back, outdoorsy lifestyle, centered on Inverness and Homosassa. It's one of the state's most affordable markets, popular with retirees and first-time buyers. The FHA loan limit covers homes here with plenty of room to spare, so 3.5% down goes a long way in Citrus County.

Citrus County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Citrus County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Citrus County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Citrus County's very affordable market, that covers virtually all homes for sale. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Citrus County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable Nature Coast living with FHA

Citrus County offers some of the best home values in Florida, well within FHA's loan limit — ideal for first-time buyers and those on a budget. Older homes that need updates can be financed with an FHA 203(k) renovation loan, and you can pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to minimize your cash to close.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Citrus County

We help FHA buyers throughout Citrus County, including Inverness, Crystal River, Homosassa, and Beverly Hills. Wherever you are in the county, we will explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment, and get you pre-approved fast. Start with our first-time buyer guide or estimate your payment with the FHA calculator.

Down payment help in Citrus County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Citrus County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Citrus County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Citrus County for 2026?+
Citrus County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers virtually all homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Citrus County good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — it's one of Florida's most affordable markets, so FHA's loan limit stretches far in Inverness, Crystal River, and Homosassa.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Citrus County?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — far above the typical Citrus County price.
How much down payment do I need in Citrus County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Citrus County?+
Yes — Inverness, Crystal River, Homosassa, Beverly Hills, and every community in the county.
